title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries Advisory Limited:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries Advisory Limited!
